original: This carbon steel chain-whip looks deceptively gauche, but it’s actually a masterpiece of weapons engineering. The handle’s mechanism electrifies the chain and strengthens it via magnetism, making the trajectory hard to predict. In addition, the chain-whip can drain a target’s shields and funnel this energy into the user’s own reserves. This weapon is often used by Babylon Skies’ club bouncers to make an example of rabble, but it’s also prized by gangsters, if they can get their hands on one.
